name: Uncle Jim's Scotch Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar well until smooth.
2. Gradually work in the flour and salt, mixing until a dough forms.
3. Divide the dough into two equal portions and flatten each portion on a lightly floured surface.
4. Cut the flattened dough into diamond shapes using a small cookie cutter. Chill the dough for about 30 minutes before cutting if desired.
5. Place the cut cookies on an ungreased baking sheet, spacing them about 1 inch apart.
6. Bake at 250 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 45 minutes, or until lightly golden brown. Check frequently after 30 minutes to ensure they do not brown too much.
This has long been a favorite Christmas cookie treat!
